text:
22. In overall view of the matter, we are of the view that no error, not to 
speak of any error of law, could be said to have been committed by 
the High Court in passing the impugned judgment and order.
23. The Special Leave Petition stands, accordingly, dismissed.
24. Pending application(s), if any, stand disposed of.
Result of the case: Special Leave Petition dismissed.
†
